title: Sme Medical Cover
definition: It provides benefits like dental, optical, outpatient and inpatient services, overseas referral treatment to India, South Africa as well as Kenya. It covers for pre-existing chronic conditions including HIV/AIDS, diabetes, high blood pressure, oncology and cancer treatment, maternity as well as road and air evacuation within Uganda. Who is this product for? Corporate institutions with a minimum of 10 staff and less than 31 lives (staff and dependants).
benefits: East African regional coverage, an emergency toll-free line, air, and road evacuation within Uganda. Wide service provider network for accessibility, immediate access for all services like dental, optical, maternity, accidental cover, drugs, specialist access, operations, chronic illness treatment, chronic care corporate management, telemedicine services, 24-hour call centre, and toll-free access among others. Tailored products can also be provided.

We also offer high benefit coverage limits, one unit rate charged per person to be covered, negotiations allowed for larger numbers to be covered. The cover gives peace of mind for HR personnel since staff can access medical attention directly and conveniently at service centers.
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
